title: albizia gummifera var. ealensis
intro: Albizia gummifera var. ealensis, also known as the East African Albizia or Jeringa tree, is a plant species native to East Africa, particularly in Kenya and Tanzania. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Albizia gummifera var. ealensis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by boiling the bark, leaves, or roots in water.
